title: Kagaku Chop
titleNative: カガクチョップ
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: Zankyou
titleNative: 残響
synopsis: Satoru spends his days listlessly in a factory town. The old man Segawa, a former Yakuza, lives in the room next to his cheap apartment. One day, Segawa tells Satoru, "I'll give you 5 million yen to put me out of my misery". Satoru hesitates, and Segawa sees through to the madness eating away inside him and begins to have a change of heart, and yet...!? A story of the filth of society and the dark path that Satoru takes, on the edge of sanity, with a gun and 5 million yen.

title: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?
titleRomaji: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?
titleNative: 終末なにしてますか? 忙しいですか? 救ってもらっていいですか?
synopsis: Five hundred years have passed since humanity went extinct at the hands of the fearsome "Beasts." Even up in the sky, where the surviving races dwell on floating islands, these monstrosities constantly threaten to bring death and destruction. Only a small group of young girls, the Leprechauns, can wield the ancient weapons needed to defeat these creatures. Into the girls' unstable and fleeting lives, where a call to certain death could come at any moment, enters an unlikely character: a young man who lost everything five hundred years ago, the last living human awakened from a long, icy slumber...

title: Rice Shoulder
titleNative: ライスショルダー
synopsis: The story revolves around a 202-pound, 18-year old girl named Okome Akino (whose name is a pun of "autumn rice"). After Okome enters a sumo match and wins against a male amateur fighter by a landslide, a trainer named Akane scouts her, and she enters the world of women's boxing. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: King in Limbo
titleNative: リンボ・ザ・キング
synonyms: リンボ ザ キング
synopsis: It's been eight years since the pandemic in which a deadly sleeping sickness claimed millions of lives. After a serious injury cost him a leg (and, nearly, his life), Petty Officer Adam Garfield retires from active service in the U.S. Navy. But his plan to focus on his family and physical therapy is shattered when he receives secret word that the sleeping sickness has returned, and it's his job to bring back the mysterious man who helped cure it by diving into people's memories—a man known by the codename "King." (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Aishite Hoshii no wa Ore ja Nai noni!: BL Game no Akuyaku Reisoku ni Tensei Shita noni Kirawarenakute Komattemasu
titleRomaji: Aishite Hoshii no wa Ore ja Nai noni!: BL Game no Akuyaku Reisoku ni Tensei Shita noni Kirawarenakute Komattemasu
titleNative: 愛してほしいのは俺じゃないのに！ 〜BLゲームの悪役令息に転生したのに嫌われなくて困ってます〜
synopsis: One day, Arthur realizes that he’s been reincarnated as the villain in a BL game. On top of that, he remembers that based on the plot of the game, he only has endings like the “Imprisonment Ending” and “Tentacle Ending” waiting for him! With no other option to save his chastity and life, his only way out is getting his fiancée to get with the protagonist! Dragging along his trusty servant Edgar, he tries to craft up schemes to get the two of them together. But, rather than being hated as the villain, he starts raising BL flags of his own?! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleEnglish: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleRomaji: Dragon Ball Gaiden: Tensei-shitara Yamcha Datta Ken
titleNative: ドラゴンボール外伝　転生したらヤムチャだった件
synopsis: A Japanese high school student is on his way to a Dragon Ball event with a friend. Suddenly, he sees a cute girl wearing a short skirt, but when he runs over to get a closer look, he trips and gets knocked out. Upon waking up, he realizes he's turned into Yamcha from Dragon Ball. Being an avid fan of the series, he knows what lies ahead in Yamcha's future, thus he decides to take matters into his own hands, in order to change Yamcha's fate. Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.
searchTerms: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!

title: Houkago, Bokura wa Uchuu ni Madou
titleRomaji: Houkago, Bokura wa Uchuu ni Madou
titleNative: 放課後、僕らは宇宙に惑う
synonyms: After School, We Wander in Space.
synopsis: Kinoshima Rocketry Club casually uploaded a vlog of a test firing of their hybrid engine. The engine exploded — blowing away their dream of reaching space with it — but that wasn't the only thing that blew up in that video. Ayame Madoi, a girl who worked on the engine section who happened to appear in the vlog, also exploded in popularity when viewers from across the world found her cute. While she finds this attention bewildering, she actually already has someone she wishes would notice her that way… (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
titleNative: ミミの怪談
synonyms: Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Peddler in Another World: I Can Go Back to My World Whenever I Want
titleRomaji: Itsudemo Jitaku ni Kaerareru Ore wa, Isekai de Gyoushounin wo Hajimemashita
titleEnglish: Peddler in Another World: I Can Go Back to My World Whenever I Want
titleNative: いつでも自宅に帰れる俺は、異世界で行商人をはじめました
synopsis: After quitting his job at a toxic company, Shiro Amata moves into the house his grandmother left him in her will. There, he soon makes two life-changing discoveries: one, his grandmother was really a witch from another world, and two, said other world is just on the other side of her closet door! Thanks to a book she left for Shiro, he also manages to obtain an all-powerful skill called “Equivalent Exchange,” which allows him to turn money from his world into otherworldly currency and vice versa. With this, Shiro decides to set up shop and sell convenient items like matches to the colorful inhabitants of the other world. His plan: make a massive profit on the goods he brings from home to become so rich that he never needs another job ever again! Based on the light novel of the same name. (Source: j-novel club)

title: Imouto wa Shitteiru
titleNative: 妹は知っている
synopsis: At work, Kiichiro Miki is an ordinary salaryman who is considered expressionless and dull by his co-workers. He floats around at drinking parties and doesn't seem to be having any fun at all. But only I, his younger sister, knows the truth about him. My brother is actually “the most interesting man in the world." (Source: Kodansha, translated)
